text:
A boy jumped off a cliff.








.




.




.



.




.




.




.




.

.

.

That bird.




.

.




.





.




.




.




.




.




.




.









That’s about all there is.













.




.

Okay. I guess I would.




.











.



That probably.

Oh.

That’s a lot.
